current_commit_message: Fixing UI bug on vga mode and tiny resolutions.
Moving also box up in tiny resolutions.
Fixing UI for even smaller resolutions
Adding more enter and back buttons.
Removing 260 from back link since it is left in many controllers.
Symbol at color is now red in blue installer theme.
Decoupling ui engine and dialog app from curses library.
Ignoring keys during 0.1 seconds to avoid joysticks spamming.
Omitting seconds in the time entry from the outro.
Added launcher updater, fixed update_linux log.
Adding Ranny Snice Wallpapers to Misc Menu.
REGION_MAIN instead of REGION_MAIN_DESCRIPTION on AO menu, and some refactoring.
Using jtcores_mister always instead of jtpremium.
Using curl instead of urllib, to solve some rare connectivity issues.
More graceful error handling on connection errors.
Handling curl ssl a bit better.
Deprecating main branch db from MiSTer SAM, transitioning to the one in the db branch.
Adding Transition Service Only run mode.
Adding agg23's MiSTer Cores, & info button on Unofficial Cores menu.
Using star instead of checkmark for compatibility.
Updating the Pocket Firmware info on a schedule.
Using a reusable workflow to trigger dependent jobs.

Updated launcher hash and better logging
